Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `vo2max_time_length_v8`                                   | vo2max_time_length_v8                                   | number   | Indicates how long time the VO2 max test lasted. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `vo2max_outcome_v8`                                       | vo2max_outcome_v8                                       | string   | VO2 max in ml/min. Measured using a graded exercise test on a stationary cycle ergometer with gradually increasing resistance in 1-3 minute stages, until exhaustion. During the test, oxygen uptake is continuously measured using a metabolic cart connected to a breath-by-breath gas analysis system via a face mask. Heart rate is monitored using a heart rate monitor. Visit 8.                                                                                        |
| `vo2max_upload_ldrive_v8`                                 | vo2max_upload_ldrive_v8                                 | string   | Indicates whetner or not the VO2 max test is saved on the L-drive. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `vo2max_upload_v8`                                        | vo2max_upload_v8                                        | string   | VO2max data upload. Workflow. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `homeurin_deviation_v8`                                   | homeurin_deviation_v8                                   | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during homeurin sample. Deviations include delay, missed sample, wrong tube, or insufficient volume. Applies to all items in this matrix. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `stool_sample_deviation_v8`                               | stool_sample_deviation_v8                               | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during stool sample. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `sens_deviation_v8`                                       | sens_deviation_v8                                       | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during SENS monitoring. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `spit_sample_deviation_v8`                                | spit_sample_deviation_v8                                | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during spit sample. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `urin_sample_deviation_v8`                                | urin_sample_deviation_v8                                | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during urin sample on site. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `whr_deviation_v8`                                        | whr_deviation_v8                                        | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during waist and hip measurement. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `dxa_deviation_v8`                                        | dxa_deviation_v8                                        | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during dxa scan. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `food_preference_deviation_v8`                            | food_preference_deviation_v8                            | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during food preference test. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `fibro_deviation_v8`                                      | fibro_deviation_v8                                      | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during fibroscan. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `blood_pressure_deviation_v8`                             | blood_pressure_deviation_v8                             | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during blood pressure measurement. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `hba1c_deviation_v8`                                      | hba1c_deviation_v8                                      | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during HbA1c blood sample. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `mmtt_blood_deviation_v8`                                 | mmtt_blood_deviation_v8                                 | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during MMTT blood sample. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `finapres_deviation_v8`                                   | finapres_deviation_v8                                   | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during MMTT finapres. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `vas_deviation_v8`                                        | vas_deviation_v8                                        | string   | Record any deviations from protocol duringMMTT VAS. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `medicin_deviation_v8`                                    | medicin_deviation_v8                                    | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during medication consumption walk through. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `survey_deviation_v8`                                     | survey_deviation_v8                                     | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during surveys/questionnaires. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `cognition_deviation_v8`                                  | cognition_deviation_v8                                  | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during cognition test. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `vo2max_deviation_v8`                                     | vo2max_deviation_v8                                     | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during VO2 max test. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `other_deviation_v8`                                      | other_deviation_v8                                      | string   | Record any other deviations from protocol. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `homeurin_deviation_describe_v8`                          | homeurin_deviation_describe_v8                          | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the home urin collection. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `stoolsample_deviation_describe_v8`                       | stoolsample_deviation_describe_v8                       | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the stool sample. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `sens_deviation_describe_v8`                              | sens_deviation_describe_v8                              | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the SENS activity tracker. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `spitsample_deviation_describe_v8`                        | spitsample_deviation_describe_v8                        | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the spit sample. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `urin_onsite_deviation_describe_v8`                       | urin_onsite_deviation_describe_v8                       | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the urine sample on site. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `whr_deviation_describe_v8`                               | whr_deviation_describe_v8                               | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the measurements of the waist hip ratio. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `dxa_deviation_describe_v8`                               | dxa_deviation_describe_v8                               | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the DXA scan. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `food_preference_deviation_describe_v8`                   | food_preference_deviation_describe_v8                   | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the food preference test. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `fibro_deviation_describe_v8`                             | fibro_deviation_describe_v8                             | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the fibro scan. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `bp_deviation_describe_v8`                                | bp_deviation_describe_v8                                | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the measurements of the blood pressure. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `hba1c_deviation_describe_v8`                             | hba1c_deviation_describe_v8                             | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the HbA1c sample. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `mmtt_blood_deviation_describe_v8`                        | mmtt_blood_deviation_describe_v8                        | string   | Description of any deviations regarding blood samples during MMTT. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `finapres_deviation_describe_v8`                          | finapres_deviation_describe_v8                          | string   | Description of any deviations regarding finapres during MMTT. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `vas_deviation_describe_v8`                               | vas_deviation_describe_v8                               | string   | Description of any deviations regarding VAS. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `medicin_deviation_describe_v8`                           | medicin_deviation_describe_v8                           | string   | Description of any deviations regarding medicine. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `survey_deviation_describe_v8`                            | survey_deviation_describe_v8                            | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the surveys. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `cognition_deviation_describe_v8`                         | cognition_deviation_describe_v8                         | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the cognitive tests. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `vo2max_deviation_describe_v8`                            | vo2max_deviation_describe_v8                            | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the VO2 max test. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `other_deviation_describe_v8`                             | other_deviation_describe_v8                             | string   | Description of any other deviations from the protocol. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `comments_end_v8`                                         | comments_end_v8                                         | string   | Comment at the end of the visit. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `intervention_challenges_v8___1`                          | Udfordring i forhold til diæten.                        | boolean  | Challenges with adherence to the intervention, whether diet or training. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `intervention_challenges_v8___2`                          | Udfordring i forhold til træningen.                     | boolean  | Challenges with adherence to the intervention, whether diet or training. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `intervention_challenges_v8___3`                          | Andet                                                   | boolean  | Challenges with adherence to the intervention, whether diet or training. Visit 8.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |

: Fields in the `besgsdag_8` resource.
